name: EduMate_Tutor_Agent
_note: Requires a Google Gemini credential configured in n8n (Settings > Credentials > Google Gemini). Connect it to the 'Google Gemini Chat Model' node.

options.systemMessage: You are EduMate AI, an intelligent educational assistant. Always use the provided knowledge base context. CRITICAL: Output raw JSON only — no markdown fences, no preamble.
